message:
🐛 Add TTL expiry to OAuth state store (#2557)

* 🐛 Add TTL expiry to OAuth state store

Prevent unbounded growth of in-memory OAuth state map by adding
a background goroutine that periodically purges expired entries.

Previously cleanup only happened inline when new states were added,
so if no OAuth flows were initiated, stale entries would linger
indefinitely. The new background sweeper runs every 5 minutes
(oauthStateCleanupInterval) and removes entries older than 10 minutes
(oauthStateExpiration). All durations use named constants.

Fixes #2548

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix Dockerfile Go version to match go.mod 1.25.0

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
